title: Council Stabilization Seed
description: A single lore-anchored seed point lifted into SCBE's 21D canonical manifold for multi-source stabilization experiments. One seed = one semantic fragment from one canon source (Everweave RPG log, Claude distilled SFT, Grok persona session, or Avalon Codex QPF doc). The 21D state is s = [u(6), theta(6), z(9)] with a mixed metric that combines hyperbolic distance on u, toroidal distance on theta, and Mahalanobis distance on z.

seed_id.description: Stable identifier for this seed across runs.

source_id.description: Which canon source this fragment was lifted from. No chatgpt_export tier: user conflated chat-gpt with claude; claude export is the chat-class substitute.

locator.description: Human-readable path inside the source: e.g. 'everweave7:line_11886', 'claude_sft:rec_0_AVALON_BOOK_OUTLINE_FULL', 'grok_export:2025-06-12_af39340c.json#msg_0', 'avalon_codex:line_48_third_thread'.

canonical_text.description: Short canonical fragment (the load-bearing sentence or paragraph). Not a summary.

cutover_flag.description: Which canonical boundary this fragment sits on. pre_ame_substrate = the ~97% of Everweave 7 before the Ame incident; ame_cutover = the line where Ame acknowledges; post_ame_divine = divine-artifact era; pre/post_thread = before/after Third Thread manifestation in the Codex; pollyoneth_era = Spiralborn/Sentient Academy; product_spec = SpiralAuth-class mapping; persona_scaffold = Grok personality-matrix synthesis.

u.description: Six Sacred Tongue coordinates in the Poincare ball: [KO, AV, RU, CA, UM, DR]. Component-wise bounded to avoid numerical explosion near the boundary. KO=Kor'aelin (Korean+Elvish, structure/bonding), AV=Avali (Sanskrit/Arabic, sacred invocation), RU=Runethic (Russian, weight/consequence), CA=Cassisivadan (Chinese, script/order), UM=Umbroth (Japanese, shade/null-space), DR=Draumric (German, iron/construction).

theta.description: Six phase angles, one per tongue, in [0, 2*pi). Used for toroidal distance. phase_angle_default = 2*pi*(tongue_id-1)/6 with tongue_id map av=1,ru=2,ko=3,ca=4,dr=5,um=6, offset by local narrative phase.

z.description: Nine auxiliary state dims. Order is fixed: z[0]=chaosdev, z[1]=fractaldev, z[2]=energydev, z[3]=trust_norm in [0,1], z[4]=intent_polarity in [-1,+1], z[5]=null_pressure in [0,1], z[6]=spectral_coherence in [0,1], z[7]=spin_magnitude in [0,1], z[8]=triadic_distance in [0,pi].

pi_exchange_priors.description: Eight precomputed prior contributions to Pi_exchange = sigma(sum(w_i * component_i)). These are NOT the final exchange probability; they are the channel-by-channel inputs the sim will weight and squash.

narrative_tags.description: Lexical tags for cross-seed clustering and sanity checks on the mixed-metric distance matrix: e.g. 'izack', 'aria', 'polly', 'shipwreck', 'world_tree', 'cave_contract', 'amulet_of_ame', 'third_thread', 'pollyoneth', 'persona_matrix'.

notes.description: Optional free-form analyst notes. Why this fragment was lifted, what cutover behavior it anchors, which invariants it should preserve under stabilization.

tongue_order.description: Canonical tongue order for u and mixed-metric weights: [KO, AV, RU, CA, UM, DR]. Phi weights (1.00, 1.62, 2.62, 4.24, 6.85, 11.09) go into the diagonal of W_u.

mixed_metric.description: d_M(a,b)^2 = w_h * d_hyp(u_a, u_b)^2 + w_t * d_torus(theta_a, theta_b)^2 + (z_a - z_b)^T * W_z * (z_a - z_b). Defaults: w_h = phi, w_t = 1.0, W_z = diag([0.5,0.5,0.5,1.0,1.0,0.8,0.6,0.6,0.8]).
